pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.7 to support Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.1.x does not support Java 17; compilation and runtime will fail due to unsupported bytecode version and removed internal APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Java source and target version to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin defaults to older Java versions; without this, the project won't compile Java 17 features or may fail on strict JDK 17 checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to 3.10.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle Java 17 module system or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-surefire-plugin to 3.0.0-M6 to support Java 17 test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions often fail to launch JVMs for Java 17 tests due to module access restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update lettuce-core to 6.1.8.RELEASE for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lettuce versions may rely on removed internal JDK APIs or have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update guava to 31.1-jre for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may not be fully compatible with Java 17 module system or internal APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update caffeine to 3.0.6 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Caffeine 2.x may have issues with Java 17; 3.x is the supported version for newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update lombok to 1.18.24 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to process annotations correctly on Java 17 due to module access restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update aerospike-client to 5.1.11 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Aerospike client versions may not support Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update reactor-extra to 3.4.8 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Reactor versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update wiremock to 2.27.2 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older WireMock versions may fail to run on Java 17 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update resilience4j to 1.7.1 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Resilience4j versions may not be compatible with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update log4j2 to 2.17.2 to address security vulnerabilities and ensure Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Log4j2 versions have known CVEs and may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update gson to 2.9.0 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Gson versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update disruptor to 3.4.4 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Disruptor versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update reflections to 0.10.2 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Reflections versions may fail to scan classes correctly on Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update equals-verifier to 3.10 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older EqualsVerifier versions may fail to run on Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update checkstyle to 10.2 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Checkstyle versions may not support Java 17 syntax or module system.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update jacoco-plugin to 0.8.8 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not instrument Java 17 bytecode correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update awaitility to 4.2.0 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Awaitility versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-source-plugin to 3.2.1 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older source plugin versions may not handle Java 17 modules correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-clean-plugin to 3.2.0 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older clean plugin versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-release-plugin to 3.0.0-M5 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older release plugin versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update spring-boot-maven-plugin to 2.6.7 to match Spring Boot parent.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched plugin versions can cause build failures or runtime issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update checkstyle-plugin to 3.1.2 for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older checkstyle plugin versions may not support Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation-api dependency for Java 17 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 17 removed javax.validation from the JDK; explicit dependency is required.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/PBCacheAp.general_idea: Replace deprecated allowedOrigins with allowedOriginPatterns to support wildcard origins with credentials in Spring WebFlux on Java 17.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/PBCacheAp.why_exists: Spring Framework 5.3+ (common in Java 17 stacks) throws an IllegalArgumentException at runtime if allowedOrigins contains wildcards while allowCredentials is true; allowedOriginPatterns is the required replacement.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.general_idea: Replace deprecated Resilience4j CircuitBreakerConfig methods with their modern equivalents to maintain compatibility with newer library versions.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.why_exists: The methods ringBufferSizeInHalfOpenState and ringBufferSizeInClosedState are deprecated or removed in newer Resilience4j versions, causing compilation errors or warnings that break strict build policies.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Update import statement for Reactor Retry class to match the new package structure in Project Reactor 3.4+.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.why_exists: The class reactor.retry.Retry was removed in Reactor 3.4; using the old import causes a compile error 'package reactor.retry does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Refactor getRetryPolicy method to use the new Retry API fluent builder instead of the deprecated static factory methods.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.why_exists: The methods Retry.onlyIf, .retryMax, and .exponentialBackoffWithJitter were removed in Reactor 3.4; using them causes a compile error 'cannot find symbol'.
